---
title: "My Blog"
listing:
  contents: posts
  feed: true
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [date, title, reading-time, description, categories]
title-block-banner: false
---

## 🌿Welcome to the chaos 🌿

Hello, I am Melinda! I am an ecologist in training, recovered hater of coding, and full-time caretaker of my immune system. This blog combines all the fun of graduate school in ecological restoration and navigating chronic illness...it is definitely an adventure!

*Want to know more? Head to my [About](about.qmd) page.*
